controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks debit card - issuance and conduct) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks
Debit Card - Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks debit card - issuance and conduct) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to 'banks' or 'rcbs' and individually as a 'bank' or 'rcb')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to all Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to 'banks' or 'RCBs' and individually as a 'bank' or 'RCB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to 'banks' or 'rcbs' and individually as a 'bank' or 'rcb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981
controls.control_description:
In this context, Rural Co-operative Banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks and
Central Co-operative Banks, as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural
Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read along with prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to debit and co-branded debit cards, as issued by
controls.control_description:
These directions cover the general and conduct regulations relating to debit cards
(including co-branded debit cards) which shall be read along with prudential, payment
and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to debit and co-branded
debit cards, as issued by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read along with prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to debit and co-branded debit cards, as issued by

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) cardholder is a person to whom a card is issued or one who is authorized to use an issued card
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) Cardholder is a person to whom a card is issued or one who is authorized to use
an issued card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) cardholder is a person to whom a card is issued or one who is authorized to use an issued card

controls.control_objective: To ensure of identification, linked to a savings bank / current account which can be used to withdraw cash, make online payments, do pos terminal/quick response
controls.control_description:
(6) Debit Card is a physical or virtual payment instrument containing a means of
identification, linked to a Savings Bank / Current Account which can be used to
withdraw cash, make online payments, do PoS terminal/Quick Response (QR) code
transactions, fund transfer, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to of identification, linked to a savings bank / current account which can be used to withdraw cash, make online payments, do pos terminal/quick response

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate comprehensive policy / policies and procedures with the approval of its board covering, inter alia, the following aspects: (1) debit card is
controls.control_description:
A bank shall formulate comprehensive policy / policies and procedures with the approval
of its Board covering, inter alia, the following aspects:
(1) Debit card issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate comprehensive policy / policies and procedures with the approval of its board covering, inter alia, the following aspects: (1) debit card is

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a board-approved comprehensive debit cards issuance policy and issue debit cards in accordance with the same
controls.control_description:
A bank shall formulate a Board-approved comprehensive debit cards issuance policy
and issue debit cards in accordance with the same.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate a board-approved comprehensive debit cards issuance policy and issue debit cards in accordance with the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be issued to customers having savings bank / current accounts
controls.control_description: Debit cards shall only be issued to customers having Savings Bank / Current Accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be issued to customers having savings bank / current accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue debit cards to cash credit / loan accounts
controls.control_description: A bank shall not issue debit cards to cash credit / loan accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue debit cards to cash credit / loan accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure force a customer to avail debit card facility and shall not link issuance of debit card to availment of any other facility from the bank
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not force a customer to avail debit card facility and shall not link issuance
of debit card to availment of any other facility from the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to force a customer to avail debit card facility and shall not link issuance of debit card to availment of any other facility from the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake review of its operations / issue of debit cards on half-yearly basis
controls.control_description:
The bank shall undertake review of its operations / issue of debit cards on half-yearly
basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake review of its operations / issue of debit cards on half-yearly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, inter-alia, card usage analysis including cards not used for long durations and the inherent risks therein
controls.control_description:
The review shall include, inter-alia, card usage analysis including cards not used
for long durations and the inherent risks therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, inter-alia, card usage analysis including cards not used for long durations and the inherent risks therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue other form factors in place of / in addition to a plastic debit card such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers may issue other form factors in place of / in addition to a plastic debit card
such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue other form factors in place of / in addition to a plastic debit card such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to all the specific and general guidelines applicable to the respective cards
controls.control_description:
Form factors shall be subject to all the specific and general guidelines applicable to the
respective cards.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be subject to all the specific and general guidelines applicable to the respective cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide options for disabling or blocking the form factor in line with the instructions issued by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall provide options for disabling or blocking the form factor in line with
the instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide options for disabling or blocking the form factor in line with the instructions issued by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the board approved policy of the card- issuer
controls.control_description:
The co-branding arrangement shall be as per the Board approved policy of the card-
issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the board approved policy of the card- issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically address issues pertaining to various risks, including reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in place suitable risk
controls.control_description:
The policy shall specifically address issues pertaining to various risks, including
reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in place suitable risk
mitigation measures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically address issues pertaining to various risks, including reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in place suitable risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated to the cardholder and also displayed on the website of the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
Further, the information relating to revenue sharing between the
card-issuer and the cobranding partner entity shall be indicated to the cardholder and
also displayed on the website of the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated to the cardholder and also displayed on the website of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue debit cards in tie-up with other non-bank entities
controls.control_description:
However, RCBs shall not issue debit cards in tie-up with other non-bank
entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue debit cards in tie-up with other non-bank entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subject to the specific conditions applicable to such cards
controls.control_description:
In addition to the conditions listed herein, the co-branding arrangement for debit
cards and prepaid cards shall also be subject to the specific conditions applicable to
such cards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subject to the specific conditions applicable to such cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure explicitly indicate that the card has been issued under a cobranding arrangement
controls.control_description:
The co-branded card shall explicitly indicate that the card has been issued under a
cobranding arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to explicitly indicate that the card has been issued under a cobranding arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure advertise / market the cobranded card as its own product
controls.control_description:
The co-branding partner shall not advertise / market the
cobranded card as its own product.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to advertise / market the cobranded card as its own product

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly shown
controls.control_description:
In all marketing/advertising material, the name of
the card-issuer shall be clearly shown.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly shown

controls.control_objective: To ensure prominently bear the branding of the card-issuer
controls.control_description: The co-branded card shall prominently bear the branding of the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prominently bear the branding of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out due diligence in respect of the co-branding partner entity with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect th
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall carry out due diligence in respect of the co-branding partner entity
with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect themselves
against the reputation risk they are exposed to in such an arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out due diligence in respect of the co-branding partner entity with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect th

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that in cases where the proposed co-branding partner is a financial entity, it has obtained necessary approvals from its regulator for entering
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers
shall ensure that in cases where the proposed co-branding partner is a financial entity,
it has obtained necessary approvals from its regulator for entering into the co-branding
arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that in cases where the proposed co-branding partner is a financial entity, it has obtained necessary approvals from its regulator for entering

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be liable for the acts of the co-branding partner
controls.control_description: Card-issuers shall also be liable for the acts of the co-branding partner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be liable for the acts of the co-branding partner

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure adherence to the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025, as amended from time to tim
controls.control_description:
The card-issuer
shall ensure adherence to the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks -
Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure adherence to the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025, as amended from time to tim

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that cash backs, discounts and other offers advertised by a co- branding partner are delivered to the cardholder on time
controls.control_description:
Card-
issuers shall ensure that cash backs, discounts and other offers advertised by a co-
branding partner are delivered to the cardholder on time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that cash backs, discounts and other offers advertised by a co- branding partner are delivered to the cardholder on time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable for any delay or non-delivery of the same to the cardholders
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall be liable for
any delay or non-delivery of the same to the cardholders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable for any delay or non-delivery of the same to the cardholders

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to marketing / distribution of the cards and providing access to the cardholder for the goods/services that are offered
controls.control_description:
The role of the co-branding partner entity under the tie-up arrangement shall be limited
to marketing / distribution of the cards and providing access to the cardholder for the
goods/services that are offered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to marketing / distribution of the cards and providing access to the cardholder for the goods/services that are offered

controls.control_objective: To ensure have access to information relating to transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other service offered by them to the ca
controls.control_description:
The co-branding partner (CBP) shall not have access to information relating to
transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other service
offered by them to the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have access to information relating to transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other service offered by them to the ca

controls.control_objective: To ensure be involved in any of the processes or the controls relating to the co-branded card except for being the initial point of contact in case of grievance
controls.control_description:
Post issuance of the card, the CBP shall not be
involved in any of the processes or the controls relating to the co-branded card except
for being the initial point of contact in case of grievances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be involved in any of the processes or the controls relating to the co-branded card except for being the initial point of contact in case of grievance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be drawn directly from the card-issuer's system in an encrypted form and displayed in the cbp's platform with robust security
controls.control_description:
However, for the purpose of
cardholder's convenience, card transaction related data may be drawn directly from the
card-issuer's system in an encrypted form and displayed in the CBP's platform with
robust security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be drawn directly from the card-issuer's system in an encrypted form and displayed in the cbp's platform with robust security

controls.control_objective: To ensure be visible only to the cardholder and shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the cbp
controls.control_description:
The information displayed through the CBP's platform shall be visible
only to the cardholder and shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the CBP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be visible only to the cardholder and shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the cbp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required by the banks to become a co-branding partner of card-issuers including credit card issuers
controls.control_description:
Prior approval shall not be required by the banks to become a co-branding partner of
card-issuers including Credit Card issuers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required by the banks to become a co-branding partner of card-issuers including credit card issuers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the conditions stipulated under paragraphs 24 and 25
controls.control_description:
The role of the co-branding partner shall be
as per the conditions stipulated under paragraphs 24 and 25.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the conditions stipulated under paragraphs 24 and 25

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep internal records to enable operations to be traced and errors to be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred case
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall keep internal records to enable operations to be traced and errors to
be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred cases) as
prescribed under Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Know Your
Customer) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep internal records to enable operations to be traced and errors to be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred case

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided with a record of the transactions after they have completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the bank statem
controls.control_description:
The cardholder shall be provided with a record of the transactions after they have
completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the bank
statement/email/SMS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided with a record of the transactions after they have completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the bank statem

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider issuing card with advanced features that may evolve from time to time
controls.control_description:
With a view to reducing the instances of misuse of lost / stolen cards, it is recommended
to the card-issuers that they may consider issuing card with advanced features that may
evolve from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider issuing card with advanced features that may evolve from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that a standard operating procedure is followed as approved by their board
controls.control_description:
In case card-issuers, at their discretion, decide to block / deactivate / suspend a debit
card, it shall be ensured that a standard operating procedure is followed as approved by
their Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that a standard operating procedure is followed as approved by their board

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be ensured that blocking/deactivating/suspending a card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card is immediately intimated to the cardholde
controls.control_description:
Further, it shall also be ensured that blocking/deactivating/suspending a
card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card is immediately intimated to the
cardholder along with reasons thereof through electronic means (SMS, email, etc.) and
other available modes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be ensured that blocking/deactivating/suspending a card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card is immediately intimated to the cardholde

controls.control_objective: To ensure block a lost card immediately on being informed by the cardholder and formalities
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall block a lost card immediately on being informed by the cardholder
and formalities, if any, can follow within a reasonable period clearly defined in the Board
approved policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to block a lost card immediately on being informed by the cardholder and formalities

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide to the cardholder the detailed procedure to report the loss, theft or unauthorised use of card or pin
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall provide to the cardholder the detailed procedure to report the loss,
theft or unauthorised use of card or PIN.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to provide to the cardholder the detailed procedure to report the loss, theft or unauthorised use of card or pin

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide multiple channels such as a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for sms, dedicated e-mail-id, interactive voice response, clearly visible lin
controls.control_description:
They shall provide multiple channels such as
a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for SMS, dedicated e-mail-id, Interactive Voice
Response, clearly visible link on the website, internet banking and mobile-app or any
other mode for reporting an unauthorized transaction on 24 x 7 basis and allow the
customer to initiate the blocking of the card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide multiple channels such as a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for sms, dedicated e-mail-id, interactive voice response, clearly visible lin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adequately publicized
controls.control_description:
The process for blocking the card, dedicated
helpline as well as the SMS numbers, shall be adequately publicized.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adequately publicized

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately send a confirmation to the cardholder subsequent to the blocking of a card
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall immediately send a confirmation to the cardholder subsequent to the
blocking of a card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately send a confirmation to the cardholder subsequent to the blocking of a card

controls.control_objective: To ensure dispatch a card to a customer unsolicited
controls.control_description: A card-issuer shall not dispatch a card to a customer unsolicited.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to dispatch a card to a customer unsolicited

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided an option to decline the same if he / she wants to do so before dispatching the renewed card
controls.control_description:
In case of renewal of
an existing card, the cardholder shall be provided an option to decline the same if he /
she wants to do so before dispatching the renewed card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided an option to decline the same if he / she wants to do so before dispatching the renewed card

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued with the explicit consent of the cardholder
controls.control_description:
Further, in case a card is
blocked at the request of the cardholder, replacement card in lieu of the blocked card
shall be issued with the explicit consent of the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued with the explicit consent of the cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided in a transparent manner including source of such benefits
controls.control_description:
Any discounts, cashbacks, reward points, loyalty points or any other benefits offered by
the card-issuer shall be provided in a transparent manner including source of such
benefits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided in a transparent manner including source of such benefits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be verifiable in the books of the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
The accounting process for the same shall be verifiable in the books of the
card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be verifiable in the books of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed on the website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also be provided to the cardholder
controls.control_description:
Detailed information regarding these benefits shall be displayed on the
website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also be provided to the
cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed on the website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also be provided to the cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the relevant nomination details are recorded by the insurance company and the availability of insurance is included, along with other info
controls.control_description:
However, in case a card-issuer or a card payment network provides an insurance
cover, complimentary or chargeable (with the consent of the cardholder), the card-issuer
shall ensure that the relevant nomination details are recorded by the Insurance
Company and the availability of insurance is included, along with other information, in
every statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the relevant nomination details are recorded by the insurance company and the availability of insurance is included, along with other info

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include the details regarding the insurance cover, name / address and telephone number of the insurance company which will handle the claims rela
controls.control_description:
The information shall also include the details regarding the insurance
cover, name / address and telephone number of the Insurance Company which will
handle the claims relating to the insurance cover.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include the details regarding the insurance cover, name / address and telephone number of the insurance company which will handle the claims rela

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided in the statements
controls.control_description:
In case of group insurance policy, the
contact details of the concerned officials of the card-issuer shall be provided in the
statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided in the statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be contractual
controls.control_description: The relationship between the card-issuer and the cardholder shall be contractual.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be contractual

controls.control_objective: To ensure make available to the cardholders in writing, a set of contractual terms and conditions governing the issue and use of such cards
controls.control_description:
Card-
issuers shall make available to the cardholders in writing, a set of contractual terms and
conditions governing the issue and use of such cards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make available to the cardholders in writing, a set of contractual terms and conditions governing the issue and use of such cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be expressed clearly and also maintain a fair balance between the interests of the parties concerned
controls.control_description:
These terms shall be expressed
clearly and also maintain a fair balance between the interests of the parties concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be expressed clearly and also maintain a fair balance between the interests of the parties concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned in clear and simple language (preferably in english, hindi and the local language) comprehensible to the cardholder
controls.control_description:
The terms and conditions for the issue and usage of a card shall be mentioned in clear
and simple language (preferably in English, Hindi and the local language)
comprehensible to the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned in clear and simple language (preferably in english, hindi and the local language) comprehensible to the cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy any charge that was not explicitly indicated to the cardholder at the time of issue of the card and without getting his / her explicit consent
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall not levy any charge that was not explicitly indicated to the cardholder
at the time of issue of the card and without getting his / her explicit consent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy any charge that was not explicitly indicated to the cardholder at the time of issue of the card and without getting his / her explicit consent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to charges like service taxes which may subsequently be levied by the government or any other statutory authority
controls.control_description:
However,
<image>
this shall not be applicable to charges like service taxes which may subsequently be
levied by the Government or any other statutory authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to charges like service taxes which may subsequently be levied by the government or any other statutory authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed on the card-issuer's website
controls.control_description:
The details of all the charges
associated with cards shall be displayed on the card-issuer's website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed on the card-issuer's website

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated to the cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction
controls.control_description:
The convenience fee, if any charged on specific transactions, shall be indicated to the
cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated to the cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly specify the time-period for reversal of unsuccessful / failed transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified time
controls.control_description:
The terms shall clearly specify the time-period for reversal of unsuccessful / failed
transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified timeline.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly specify the time-period for reversal of unsuccessful / failed transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given to the cardholder to enable him / her to withdraw if he / she so chooses
controls.control_description:
The terms may be altered by the card-issuer, but 30 days' notice of the change shall be
given to the cardholder to enable him / her to withdraw if he / she so chooses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given to the cardholder to enable him / her to withdraw if he / she so chooses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be notified to the cardholder through all the communication channels available
controls.control_description:
The change in terms shall be
notified to the cardholder through all the communication channels available.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be notified to the cardholder through all the communication channels available

controls.control_objective: To ensure put the cardholder under an obligation to take all appropriate steps to keep the card safe and not to record the pin or code, in any form that would b
controls.control_description:
The terms shall put the cardholder under an obligation to take all appropriate steps to
keep the card safe and not to record the PIN or code, in any form that would be
intelligible or otherwise accessible to any third party if access is gained to such a record,
either honestly or dishonestly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put the cardholder under an obligation to take all appropriate steps to keep the card safe and not to record the pin or code, in any form that would b

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify that the card-issuer shall exercise care when issuing pins or codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's pin or code to anyone
controls.control_description:
The terms shall specify that the card-issuer shall exercise care when issuing PINs or
codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or code to
anyone, except to the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to specify that the card-issuer shall exercise care when issuing pins or codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's pin or code to anyone

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subject to relevant instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and risk mitigation measures, card-to-card f
controls.control_description:
The issue of cards as a payment mechanism shall also be subject to relevant
instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and risk
mitigation measures, card-to-card fund transfers, merchant discount rates structure,
failed ATM transactions, etc, issued by the Department of Payment and Settlement
Systems, Reserve Bank of India under the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007,
and the Foreign Exchange Department, Reserve Bank of India under Foreign Exchange
Management Act, 1999, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subject to relevant instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and risk mitigation measures, card-to-card f

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a grievance redressal mechanism within the card issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall put in place a Grievance Redressal Mechanism within the card
issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a grievance redressal mechanism within the card issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned on the account statements
controls.control_description:
The
<image>
name, direct contact number, email-id and postal address of the designated grievance
redressal officer of the card-issuer shall be mentioned on the account statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned on the account statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay
controls.control_description:
The
designated officer shall ensure that grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly
without any delay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay

controls.control_objective: To ensure be stipulated in the board approved policy for issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework
controls.control_description:
Specific timelines may be stipulated in the Board approved policy for
issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be stipulated in the board approved policy for issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed on the website of the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage
controls.control_description:
The grievance
redressal procedure and the Board approved policy shall be displayed on the website of
the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed on the website of the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to competently handle and escalate, a complaint
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to
competently handle and escalate, a complaint, if necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to competently handle and escalate, a complaint

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call center / base level to higher authorities
controls.control_description:
The Grievance Redressal
process shall have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a
call center / base level to higher authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call center / base level to higher authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a system of acknowledging customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint number / docket number, even if the complaints are received over p
controls.control_description:
There shall be a system of acknowledging
customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint number / docket number, even
if the complaints are received over phone.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a system of acknowledging customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint number / docket number, even if the complaints are received over p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable to compensate the complainant for the loss of his / her time, expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suff
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall be liable to compensate the complainant for the loss of his / her time,
expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suffered by
him/her for the fault of the card-issuer and where the grievance has not been redressed
in time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable to compensate the complainant for the loss of his / her time, expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suff

controls.control_objective: To ensure first approach the concerned card-issuer
controls.control_description:
For redressal of any grievance, the customer shall first approach the concerned
card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to first approach the concerned card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure reveal any information relating to customers obtained at the time of opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization witho
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall not reveal any information relating to customers obtained at the time
of opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization without
obtaining their explicit consent, with regard to the purpose/s for which the information
will be used and the organizations with whom the information will be shared.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reveal any information relating to customers obtained at the time of opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization witho

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure strict compliance to the extant legal framework on data protection
controls.control_description:
Card-
<image>
issuers shall ensure strict compliance to the extant legal framework on data protection.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure strict compliance to the extant legal framework on data protection

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly state and explain to the customer the full meaning/implications of the disclosure clause
controls.control_description:
Further, in case where the customers give explicit consent for sharing the information
provided by them with other agencies, card-issuers shall clearly state and explain to the
customer the full meaning/implications of the disclosure clause.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly state and explain to the customer the full meaning/implications of the disclosure clause

controls.control_objective: To ensure be of such nature which will violate the provisions of law relating to maintenance of secrecy in the transactions
controls.control_description:
The information sought
from customers shall not be of such nature which will violate the provisions of law relating
to maintenance of secrecy in the transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be of such nature which will violate the provisions of law relating to maintenance of secrecy in the transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be solely responsible for the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose
controls.control_description:
The card-issuers shall be solely
responsible for the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be solely responsible for the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to access any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy obligations
controls.control_description:
Under a co-branding arrangement, the co-branding entity shall not be permitted to
access any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy
obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to access any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy obligations

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance with the relevant instructions
controls.control_description:
In case, the co-branding arrangement is
between two banks, the card issuing bank shall ensure compliance with the relevant
instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance with the relevant instructions

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure adherence to the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025, as amended from time to tim
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall ensure adherence to the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure adherence to the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025, as amended from time to tim

controls.control_objective: To ensure share card data (including transaction data) of the cardholders with the outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge th
controls.control_description:
Further, the card-issuers shall not share card data (including transaction data) of
the cardholders with the outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to
discharge the functions assigned to the latter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to share card data (including transaction data) of the cardholders with the outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained
controls.control_description:
In case of sharing of any data as stated
above, explicit consent from the cardholder shall be obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be ensured that the storage and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
It shall also be ensured
that the storage and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be ensured that the storage and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly adhered to in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards
controls.control_description:
The instructions/Directions on KYC / AML / CFT issued by RBI from time to time, shall
be strictly adhered to in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly adhered to in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed
shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.control_description:
Further, the
repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially
affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those
directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to remove
any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these Directions,
the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect of any
matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions given
by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
